g.text: Teams Meeting Room Booking - Class Diagram (Annotated for Interview)
Trace: "User searches for a 10-person room with projector, books 2pm-3pm, invites team, everyone gets notified."
"User opens Teams and wants to book a room.
It coordinates room search, calendar checks,
per room. Before creating a booking,
If conflict found, booking is rejected."
STEP 4 - How do we find the right room?
Multiple rooms might qualify. How to rank?"
Add CostBased strategy? One new class."
Has room, time slot, organizer, participants,
ranks available rooms) -> builds booking via
User calls BookingService to search/book rooms
CalendarManager checks TimeSlot conflicts, prevents double-booking
Find best room: smallest fit, preferred floor, best score
Booking created with room, slot, participants, recurrence
Participants, room display, audit log notified; via email/Teams/push
